item.title: Version 0.0.22
item.description: - Restored first-click default/reset behavior to `App Exposé`. - Added compatibility migration + legacy fallback seeding for per-slot App Exposé `>1 window only` gates (from legacy first-click/active-click preferences). - Aligned scroll up/down routing with macOS Natural vs Standard scrolling mode and added unit coverage for both mappings. - Hardened settings shell automation with menu-bar count wait/retry and made `scripts/release.sh` run required pre-tag validation by default (waiver now requires an issue reference).
